title: thymus vulgaris var. hirtus
intro: Thymus vulgaris var. hirtus, also known as the hairy thyme or thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus vulgaris plant, which belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This perennial herb is native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of thyme include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. Thyme can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as sore throats, coughs, and skin irritations.
